subject: memory: samsung: exynos5422-dmc: Fix refcount leak in of_get_dram_timings

poc_oracle.note: Query fires on the 3 ENOMEM returns (lines 46, 51, 56 in poc.c) plus the early -EINVAL acquire-fail return (line 40); the latter is a known harmless overshoot for this pattern (CFG considers it reachable from acquire) and is consistent with the rep2 oracle observation.
